title: Oyetola’s Appointment As Minister Of Marine & Blue Economy, Sign Of Tinubu’s Knack For Excellence – Kemi Ayelabola - FinancialEDGE
description: The Chairperson and Convener of Asiwaju Renewed Hope (ARH’23), one of the prominent campaign groups that galvanised grassroots mobilisation in support of Bola Ahmed Tinubu during the February 2023 Presidential election, Kemi Olokode-Ayelabola has commended the Minister for Marine and Blue Economy, Gboyega Oyetola (CON), for shaping the status of the Nigerian maritime industry.
html: The Chairperson and Convener of Asiwaju Renewed Hope (ARH’23), one of the prominent campaign groups that galvanised grassroots mobilisation in support of Bola Ahmed Tinubu during the February 2023 Presidential election, Kemi Olokode-Ayelabola has commended the Minister for Marine and Blue Economy, Gboyega Oyetola (CON), for shaping the status of the Nigerian maritime industry.
